landing.heroDesc: Upload PDFs, Word docs, spreadsheets, or photos of contracts. bAInder's AI extracts every deadline, obligation, and action item — and delivers the results in your language.
landing.freeNote: Free for 10 documents · No credit card required
landing.featureExtractTitle: Understand any document — in any format
landing.featureExtractDesc: PDF, Word, Excel, ODT, images, and more — bAInder handles every format and instantly extracts keywords, categories, and a plain-language summary.
landing.featureTrackDesc: Payments, signatures, renewals, deadlines — each becomes a tracked action item with a due date, pulled automatically from the document text.
landing.featureRemindDesc: Get an email reminder 5 days before any due date. From contract renewals to invoice payments, nothing slips through the cracks.
landing.featureSearchDesc: Search across your entire document library by keyword, category, or summary in milliseconds.
landing.featurePrivateDesc: Your documents are stored privately. Only you can access your files — enforced at the database level, not just the UI.
landing.featureLanguageDesc: Summaries, keywords, and action items are extracted in the language you work in — not just English. Upload a contract in any language, read the results in yours.
landing.taglineQuote: Free for your first 10 documents — no credit card required
landing.featureSectionTitle: Every document. Every deadline. Under control.
landing.ctaDesc: Free for your first 10 documents. No credit card required.

signup.checkEmailDesc: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click it to activate your account.

pricing.title: Simple, honest pricing
pricing.subtitle: Try it free. Upgrade when deadlines start to matter.
pricing.freeFeature1: 10 documents (PDF, Word, Excel, ODT, images & more)
pricing.freeFeature2: AI extraction — keywords, summary, deadlines & follow-ups
pricing.proFeature2: AI extraction — keywords, summary, deadlines & follow-ups
pricing.proFeature3: Email reminders 5 days before every deadline

upload.title: Upload Documents
upload.subtitle: PDF, Word, Excel, ODT, TXT, MD or image files up to 20 MB · multiple files supported
upload.fileTypes: PDF, DOCX, XLSX, ODT, TXT, MD, JPG, PNG · or click to browse
upload.uploadedSuccess: {count, plural, one {✓ # file uploaded successfully.} other {✓ # files uploaded successfully.}}
upload.uploadedFailed: {count, plural, one {✗ # file failed.} other {✗ # files failed.}}
upload.processingNote: Keywords and summaries will appear on the documents page shortly.

followUps.title: Follow-ups
followUps.subtitle: Action items and deadlines extracted from your documents
followUps.noFollowUpsHint: Upload and process documents to automatically extract action items.

chat.title: Ask your documents
chat.subtitle: Ask anything about your documents, deadlines, or obligations
chat.placeholder: Ask a question… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
chat.emptyTitle: What would you like to know?
chat.emptyDesc: I can answer questions about your documents, deadlines, and obligations.
chat.suggestion1: What deadlines do I have coming up?
chat.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Manage your plan and subscription.
billing.subscriptionActivated: You're on Pro — unlimited documents and email reminders are now active.
billing.unlimitedDocs: Unlimited documents, all formats, and email reminders 5 days before every deadline.
billing.updatePayment: Update your payment method, download invoices, or cancel your subscription.

documents.processing: Processing… keywords and summary will appear shortly.
documents.processingError: Processing failed. The PDF may be scanned or encrypted.

upgradeBanner.message: You've used {count} of 10 free uploads. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited uploads and email reminders. Your existing documents always stay accessible.

deleteDocument.confirmDesc: {filename} will be permanently deleted along with its keywords and summary. This cannot be undone.

renameTitle.saveHint: Enter to save · Esc to cancel

account.confirmDesc: This will permanently delete all your documents, metadata, follow-ups, and your account. This cannot be undone.
